title: Gentle Hands
lesson: Be gentle and kind to little animals.
prompts: In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the green grass, beaming with excitement at a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead. Medium shot at eye level, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — a small fluffy brown puppy bolts away in fear, its body low and tense to the ground, ears flattened back against its head, tail clamped tightly between its legs, head whipped back over its shoulder with wide, frightened eyes and the whites showing — clearly terrified and fleeing, not playing. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image leans forward on the grass with both hands reaching out too eagerly, looking surprised that the puppy ran off, with a surprised expression. Medium shot at eye level, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels in the mid-ground, watching attentively. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} crouches calmly and holds out one slow, open hand to show how to be soft and gentle with a small fluffy brown puppy. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone on the green grass, very gently stroking the back of a small fluffy brown puppy with one slow, soft hand. Medium shot at eye level, with a calm, tender smile. Warm sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the grass as a small fluffy brown puppy relaxes and snuggles up against their side, eyes softly closed and tail wagging, with a gentle, happy expression. Medium shot at eye level, warm golden light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits, with a joyful smile, gently cradling a happy, content small fluffy brown puppy in their lap. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} sits beside them, one hand resting gently on the child's shoulder, looking on proudly. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm golden sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a sunny home garden with a low wooden fence, the child kneels alone, beaming with excitement at a small brown puppy sitting a little way ahead.
In the garden, the child leans forward with both hands reaching out too eagerly and a surprised look as the small brown puppy bolts away, clearly frightened — the child was too fast and scared it.
In the garden, the child kneels watching attentively while the father crouches calmly holding out one slow, open hand to a small brown puppy, showing how to be gentle.
In the garden, the child kneels alone very gently stroking the back of the small brown puppy with one soft hand, calm and tender.
In the garden in golden light, the child sits alone as the small brown puppy relaxes and snuggles against their side, tail wagging — gentleness made a friend.
In the garden in golden light, the child cradles the happy puppy in their lap while the father rests a hand on their shoulder, looking on proudly.
texts: In the sunny garden, {NAME} met a little brown puppy. "Hello, puppy!" said {NAME}, full of excitement.
{NAME} reached out too fast, and the puppy shrank back, afraid. "Oh no, I scared it," said {NAME}. "That was too quick."
Dad knelt down beside {NAME}. "Be gentle," he said softly, holding out one slow, open hand. "Like this?" asked {NAME}. "Just like that," said Dad.
So {NAME} stroked the puppy very gently, soft and slow. "Good puppy," {NAME} whispered. The puppy stayed close, calm and happy.
The puppy snuggled right up against {NAME}, its tail going wag, wag, wag. "He likes me now!" laughed {NAME}. Being gentle had made a new friend.
{NAME} cuddled the happy puppy close. "Good job," said Dad with a smile. "Gentle hands are kind hands," said {NAME}.
